kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep those lawns looking pristine. Ready to manage your mowing schedule and grow your client list?

quickActions.label: Schedule a mowing
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new lawn mowing job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for lawn care service.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's route
quickActions.prompt: What lawn care jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a lawn care business. You help manage mowing schedules, recurring service plans, coordinate crews and routes, handle estimates for residential and commercial properties, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We'd love to help keep your lawn looking great. Are you looking for a quote or want to schedule lawn service?
commonReasons: Get a quote for lawn mowing
Ask about fertilization or weed control
Report a concern about a previous visit

steps.title: Name your lawn care business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your crews operate.

steps.title: Add your lawn services
steps.body: List the services you offer: mowing, edging, fertilization, aeration, overseeding, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing by lot size, service type, or recurring plan.

steps.title: Add your crew members
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign routes and schedule jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your lawn care business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking mowing jobs!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a lawn care business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage recurring mowing routes
Create estimates based on lot size and service type
Coordinate crew assignments and daily routes
Send automated reminders for upcoming service days
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage fertilization and treatment application schedules
Analyze revenue by service type and property size
